auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Access your daily routine at UP Móveis.
auth.errorGeneric: Could not sign in. Please check your credentials.
auth.fillFields: Please fill in email and password.

home.unlinked: This account is not yet linked to an employee. Ask the manager to link it.

gerar.title: Generate today's tasks
gerar.subtitle: Create today's tasks ({{date}}) for every active employee. Idempotent: existing tasks are kept.
gerar.action: Generate today's tasks for the team
gerar.forbidden: Only managers can access this page.

equipa.title: Team
equipa.subtitle: Manage UP Móveis employees and link their logins.
equipa.forbidden: Only managers can access this page.
equipa.cannotDelete: This employee has tasks or events recorded. Deactivate instead of deleting.
equipa.helpTitle: How to give an employee access
equipa.helpStep1: Use "Create employee with access" to create everything in one step (recommended).
equipa.helpStep2: Alternatively, create the login in Lovable Cloud → Users and link it here in the Login column.

criar.title: Create employee with access
criar.subtitle: Create the employee, the login, and the role in one step.
criar.passwordHint: At least 8 characters. Set by you and shared with the employee.
criar.mustChange: Require password change on first sign-in
criar.success: Employee created. You set the password — share it securely.

errors.email_exists: A user with this email already exists.
errors.generic: Could not create. Please try again.

trocar.title: Set a new password
trocar.subtitle: For security, set a new password before continuing.
trocar.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
